member.name: T:Prime.PupService.Handlers.DutSessionCacheHandler
member.summary: Manage Dut session cache.

member.name: T:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler
member.summary: Interface.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset the cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.TryGetResolvedPlist(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the resolve plist name from cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.CacheResolvedPlist(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store resolved plist inside due cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.TryGetExecutionMode(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the per plist execution mode from cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.CacheExecutionMode(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store per plist executiom mode in cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.TryGetPlistRvMode(System.String,System.Boolean@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns a bool indicating if the plist is in Rv enabled mode. Returns false if the plist was not initialized.
member.param: The plist rv mode if exist.
member.returns: True - plist exist and isRvMode has valid value.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.EnablePlistRvMode(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Enable a plist's Rv mode.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IDutSessionCacheHandler.DisablePlistRvMode(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Disable a plist's Rv mode.

member.summary: Reset ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IItuffHandler.PrintDebugData(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print debug data.
Print unit level ituff data.
member.param: Vaid config set to execute modes.
per plist original (automation populated) execution modes formatted as a string.
per plist current execution modes formatted as a string.

member.summary: Get lot level ituff data.
member.param: ConfigSet to Plist to Instance names database.

member.summary: Increase plist usage counter.

member.summary: Increase exclude criteria usage counter.

member.summary: AddOrUpdate exclude instance.

member.summary: Set plist exclude condition.

members.member:
Set undefined plist exclude condition.
Plist to set.' Current session.

member.name: T:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler
member.summary: Interface.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.GetCurrentProcessStepDefinition(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get current process step name and type as tuple.
Initialize the process filtered database.
member.param: Pup process filtered data from PupFile for the current process step and name.
indicates of the process was changed (HOT -> COLD for example).
unit match type - by VidOnly , EFuseOnly, VidAndEfuseBoth or EfuseAndVidOptional.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.AddAdHocUnitDefinition(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: AddOrUpdate a new unitInfo to the database.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.GetAllInstanceNames(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get all instance names per config set from the filtered process data.
member.returns: Per config set, all its instances.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.IsInstanceOrPlistExist(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns true if either the instance name or plist name exist in the process database.
member.returns: False if none exist, True otherwise.

member.summary: Is test time print enabled for current visual id.

member.summary: Get valid config set to execution modes.
member.returns: Valid config set to execution modes.

member.summary: Reset all table in shared storage.

member.summary: Set EFuse user format.

member.summary: Checks if current die was already tested - if its a re-test.

member.returns: execution modes for NPR case or retest case.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.GetOriginalNprExecutionModes
member.summary: Returns original , automation populated NPR predictions.

member.summary: Returns mapping of plists to their aliases for plists targeted by NPR.

member.summary: Returns mapping of models to their versions.
member.returns: mapping of models to their versions.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.Handlers.Interfaces.IProcessDataHandler.IsCallbackTTPrintEnabled(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns indication whether the TT spent by callbacks execution should be printed to ituff.
member.returns: true - if TT spent by callbacks execution should be printed to ituff , false - otherwise.

member.summary: Sets execution mode for given plist.

member.summary: Gets execution modes for all the targeted plists executed during current unit run.

member.summary: Convert execution mode string to type.

member.summary: Returns plist alias by plist name.

member.summary: Indicates if plist is targeted by NPR only.
member.returns: true - if plist is targeted by NPR only (and not by the model).

member.name: T:Prime.PupService.IPupConfigSet
member.summary: This is the interface of PupConfigSet object representing config set information.

member.name: P:Prime.PupService.IPupConfigSet.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the config set name.

member.name: P:Prime.PupService.IPupConfigSet.PatListName
member.summary: Gets or sets the patlist name for this config set.

member.name: P:Prime.PupService.IPupConfigSet.InflowOptimization
member.summary: Gets or sets the inflow optimization data in form of per criteria (key) information (value).

member.name: T:Prime.PupService.UnitMatchType
member.summary: Unit Match Mode - mode for matching and resolving PUP execution modes.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.UnitMatchType.VidOnly
member.summary: Match by VID only.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.UnitMatchType.EfuseOnly
member.summary: Match by eFuse only.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.UnitMatchType.VidAndEfuseBoth
member.summary: Match by both Vid and eFuse - both must be defined.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.UnitMatchType.EfuseAndVidOptional
member.summary: Match by VID and Efuse , but VID is optional.

member.name: T:Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType
member.summary: Defines plist execution modes supported by PUP infrastructure.

list.item: Full - original plist execution
Short - slim plist version execution
Monitor - executing original plist or specially defined monitor plist in monitor (InlineRV) mode

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType.None
member.summary: Nothing defined.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType.Monitor
member.summary: Plist execution in monitor mode.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType.Short
member.summary: Plist execution in short mode.

member.name: F:Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType.Full
member.summary: Plist execution in full mode.

summary.para: Interface which defines APIs for managing PUP infrastructure.
For more details, see the service SDK.
Method performing centralized setup of PUP related data base.
For more details, see the service SDK.
This function is called onlyu by PrimePupTestMethod during TP INIT.
For more details, see PUP test method documentation.

list.item: Reads pup file and initializes configsets data base
Reads patterns to disable (PTD) file and initializes slim plist versions database
Performs deep copy of original patterns to create slim plist versions on tester
if efuseFormat is not provided the per unit efuse data will be pull

member.param: specifies if PUP is enabled or not. If disabled no files and other processing is done.
Efuse format in form of {LotName}_{WaferID}_{X-coordinate}_{Y-coordinate}.if efuseFormat is not provided the per unit efuse data will be pull .
Monitor loop number for Inline reject validation execution.
if true - PUP related debug printouts will be printed to both console and ituff accross all the targeted instances in the flow.
A List of IPupConfigSets to add to the database.
The desired PUP execution mode to force and override the pup file definitions.
member.exception: will be thrown in case there is a failure to parse pup or patterns files.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.SetModelCallbacksImplementation(PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPupModelPluginCallbacks)
member.summary: Sets the model callbacks implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.ResolvePlist(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the instance or plist is targeted . If yes - returns the resolved plist name based on the instance name and plist name.

list.para: The options for a plist name "plistA" are:
list.item: If execution mode for it 'full' or the plist is not targeted - returns the original plist ("PlistA")
If execution mode for it 'short' - returns the short plist version in this format ('PlistA_slimVersion{Index}')
If execution mode for it 'monitor' - returns the monitor plist version in this format ("PlistA_monitorVersion{Index}")
If the execution mode cannot be determined for some reason - original plist is returned

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.ResolvePlistAndExecutionMode(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the instance or plist is targeted . If yes - returns the resolved plist name based on the instance name and plist name.

list.para: The options for a plist name "plistA" are:
list.item: If execution mode for it 'full' or the plist is not targeted - returns the original plist ("PlistA")
If execution mode for it 'short' - returns the short plist version in this format ('PlistA_slimVersion{Index}')
If execution mode for it 'monitor' - returns the monitor plist version in this format ("PlistA_monitorVersion{Index}")
If the execution mode cannot be determined for some reason - original plist is returned

member.returns: Resolved plist name and true is monitor is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.ResolvePlistToExecute(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the plist is targeted . If yes - returns the resolved plist name based on the plist name.

list.para: The options for a plist name "plistA" are:
list.item: If execution mode for it 'full' or the plist is not targeted - returns the original plist ("PlistA")
If execution mode for it 'short' - returns the short plist version in this format ('PlistA_slimVersion{Index}')
If execution mode for it 'monitor' - returns the monitor plist version in this format ("PlistA_monitorVersion{Index}")

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.GetExecutionMode(System.String)
member.summary: Gets execution mode for the given plist.

list.item: Full - original plist execution
Short - slim plist version execution
Monitor - executing original plist or specially defined monitor plist in monitor (InlineRV) mode
None - could not resolve the execution mode for a given plist

member.returns: execution mode for a given plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.GetAllInstanceNames
member.summary: Get all instance names set per config and per plist from the filtered process data (per process step and type).
member.returns: Per config set, per pist - instances.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.ArePatternsTriggeredToBeDisabled(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary:
Checks if all the given patterns are triggered to be skipped by PUP.
this function is used by Inline RV (monitor ) methodology.
For more details, see the service SDK.
member.returns: true - all the given patterns are triggered to be skipped by PUP , false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.DoesPlistNeedsToBeReExecuted(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.Int32,System.Boolean@)
member.summary:
Checks if the given instance and plist are targeted for PUP.
this function is used by Inline RV (monitor ) methodology.
For more details, see the service SDK.
member.param: True if this unit needs to be re-binned.
member.returns: true - if the plist needs to be re-executed, false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.ExportResultToItuff(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Export results to ituff.
member.param: True if this unit needs to be re-binned.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.IsMonitorEnabledForPlist(System.String)
member.summary:
Checks if TTR monitor is isEnabled for a given plist.
this function is used by Inline RV (monitor ) methodology.
For more details, see the service SDK.
member.returns: true - if the TTR monitor is isEnabled for the given plist , false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.IsInstanceTargetedForPUP(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the given instance and plist are targeted for PUP. To be targeted for pup instance/plist must be defined in configset which is targeted for at least one unit per certain process step and type.
member.returns: true - if the given instance and plist are targeted for PUP, false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.PrintUnitLevelItuffData
member.summary:
Prints the unit (DUT) level ituff data.
This is a per unit PUP summary example example:
2_tname_pup_configsets 2_strgval_FastShortBase,FastCacheBase2,FastMonitorBase,FastMonitorValidation,FastCacheBase 2_tname_pup_mode 2_strgval_S,S,M,M,S 2_tname_pup_count 2_strgval_3|0|0,0,1,1,0 2_tname_pup_excluderesult 2_strgval_F|F|F,F,NA,NA,F 2_tname_pup_excludereasoncount 2_strgval_0|0|0,0,0,0,0
For more details what each section indicates please see the service SDK.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.GetLotLevelItuffData
member.summary:
Returns the LOT level PUP summary as a string to be printed to ituff during Lot Start.
This is a per unit PUP summary example example:
4_tsattrs_PUP_MODE,ENABLED 4_tsattrs_PUP_PATTERNS_DIR,C:\InputFiles\BOM\1002\patterns.pup.json 4_tsattrs_PATTERNS_FILE_VERSION,1234 4_tsattrs_PUP_FILE_PATH,~HDMT_TPL_DIR\Modules\PUP\PUP\InputFiles\testingLot_2041.pup.json 4_tsattrs_MSTP_NAME,ADL0000D00S135,ADL0000E00S137 4_tsattrs_P:FastShortBase,search_plist_2|search_plist_4|search_plist_5 4_tsattrs_P:FastFullBase,search_plist3 4_tsattrs_P:FastCacheBase2,pup_cached_plist 4_tsattrs_P:FastMonitorBase,search_plist_1 4_tsattrs_P:FastMonitorValidation,search_plist 4_tsattrs_P:FastCacheBase,search_plist_6 4_tsattrs_I:FastFullBase,PUP::FASTExecuteFullPlistFullMode_P1 4_tsattrs_I:FastCacheBase2,PUP::FASTExecuteFullPlistExcludeCriteriaEntryVmin_P1 4_tsattrs_I:FastMonitorBase,PUP::FASTExecuteFullPlistMonitorMode_P1 4_tsattrs_I:FastCacheBase,PUP::FASTExecutePupSlimPlistShortModeResolvedByCache_F0^PUP::FASTExecuteFullPlistExcludeCriteriaBaseNumber_P1
For more details what each section indicates please see the service SDK.
member.returns: LOT level PUP summary as a string to be printed to ituff during Lot Start.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.GetMaxMonitorLoopNum
member.summary:
Returns the maximal number of loops for monitor (InlineRv) algorithm.
this function is used by Inline RV (monitor ) methodology.
For more details, see the service SDK.
member.returns: maximal number of loops for monitor (InlineRv) algorithm.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.IsTestTimePrintEnabledForCurrentVid
member.summary: Checks if the test time printout to Ituff is isEnabled for the current unit.
member.returns: true - if the TT printout is isEnabled , false - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.PupService.IPupService.AddAdHocPerConfigSetExecutionModes(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.PupService.ExecutionModeType})
member.summary: Adds new config set --> ExecutionMode definition to the current device database.
